Description: The realm's premier publication on beauty and fashion, this specific copy of <Emphasis>Modern Aesthetics</Emphasis> covers, in detail, techniques for concealing one's visage with a luscious curtain of locks that fall past the eyes.

The realm's premier publication on beauty and fashion, this specific copy of <Emphasis>Modern Aesthetics</Emphasis> covers, in detail, techniques for concealing one's visage with a luscious curtain of locks that fall past the eyes.

Use to unlock a new hairstyle at the aesthetician.
Name: Modern Aesthetics: Fulsome Forelocks
